narrative:
Hillsboro City has 4,123 registered voters, with 60.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points.
